subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Your letter dated the ninth of Rajab 1339 was received and its contents brought joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه شما که بتاریخ نهم رجب ۳۳۹ بود رسید مضمون مورث فرح
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
